en: The following is a conversation with Elon Musk, DJ Sa,
ko: The following is a conversation with Elon Musk, DJ Sa,

en: about Neuralink and the future of humanity.
ko: about Neuralink and the future of humanity.

en: Elon, DJ, Matthew, and Bliss are, of course, part of the amazing Neuralink team,
ko: Elon, DJ, Matthew, and Bliss are, of course, part of the amazing Neuralink team,
ja: もちろん、この10年ほどで新しい技術により、より多くの人が

en: and Noland is the first human to have a Neuralink device implanted in his brain.
ko: and Noland is the first human to have a Neuralink device implanted in his brain.

en: I speak with each of them individually, so use timestamps to jump around,
ko: I speak with each of them individually, so use timestamps to jump around,

ko: or, as I recommend, go hardcore and listen to the whole thing.

en: This is the longest podcast I've ever done.
ko: This is the longest podcast I've ever done.

en: It's a fascinating, super technical, and wide-ranging conversation,
ko: It's a fascinating, super technical, and wide-ranging conversation,

en: and I loved every minute of it.
ko: and I loved every minute of it.
